---
title: "Courses"
---

I teach courses at the [Takshashila Institution](https://takshashila.org.in) on economics and public policy.

## Current Modules

::: {.course-card}
### Economic Reasoning for Public Policy

Applying the concepts of economics to analyse and formulate public policy.

**Course:** [GCPP](https://school.takshashila.org.in/gcpp-public-policy), [PGP](https://school.takshashila.org.in/pgp)
:::

::: {.course-card}
### Information Economics

A module on the economics of information goods, with a special focus on platform economics.

**Course:** [GCPP - Tech Policy](https://school.takshashila.org.in/gcpp-technology-policy)
:::

::: {.course-card}
### Strategic Economics

A module on understanding economics statecraft.

**Course:** [GCPP - Defence & Foreign Affairs](https://school.takshashila.org.in/gcpp-defence-foreign-affairs)
:::

::: {.course-card}
### Policy Pathways

A course on fundamentals of economics and public policy to 8th & 9th graders.

**Course:** [GenWise Wizards](https://genwise.in/gsp-2026-may/wizards/)
:::

::: {.course-card}
### Nagara

I conduct a 3-hour long role-playing, democracy simulation game called Nagara, which is not only immensely enjoyable by participants, but is also a great teaching device to talk about government, policy, society and markets.
:::

---

## Guest Lectures

I'm available for guest lectures on Economic Policy, Trade and Geoeconomics, Platform Economics, Bioeconomy, and to conduct Nagara. [Contact me](mailto:anupam@takshashila.org.in) for speaking engagements.
